  "findings": [
    "Missing insulating bushing on Rigid Metal Conduit (RMC) where required to protect conductors from abrasion."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Procure and install the correct size of threaded insulating bushings (or grounding bushings if required) on all RMC terminations prior to pulling wire."
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged materials or mockups lack the required conduit bushings. NEC Article 344.46 requires a bushing to protect conductors from abrasion where RMC enters a box, fitting, or enclosure, unless the design of the box or fitting provides equivalent protection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 344.46",
    "NEC Article 300.4(G)"
  ]
}
